mapper.sql: select a.hkxx_id, hkpch, xh, lx, zh, a.hm, a.hh, je, (case when a.dept_id='620000' then a.dept_id when a.dept_id like '626%' then a.dept_id else rpad(substr(a.dept_id, 1, 4), 6, 0) end) as `sjdm`, a.dept_id, dz, fy, a.jym, thbj, thrq, thyy, schkpch, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, b.qrrq, b.dzbj, b.yhhdh, b.bz, b.create_by as sub_CREATE_BY, b.create_time as sub_CREATE_TIME, b.update_by as sub_UPDATE_BY, b.update_time as sub_UPDATE_TIME from gh_hkxx a left join gh_hkxx_qrsz b on b.hkxx_id = a.hkxx_id
mapper.select: select a.hkxx_id, a.hkpch, a.xh, a.lx, a.zh, a.hm, a.hh, a.je, a.dept_id, a.dz, a.fy, a.jym, a.thbj, a.thrq, a.thyy, a.schkpch, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, b.hkxx_id as sub_HKXX_ID, b.gh_hkxx_jym as sub_GH_HKXX_JYM, b.qrrq as sub_QRRQ, b.dzbj as sub_DZBJ, b.yhhdh as sub_YHHDH, b.bz as sub_BZ, b.create_by as sub_CREATE_BY, b.create_time as sub_CREATE_TIME, b.update_by as sub_UPDATE_BY, b.update_time as sub_UPDATE_TIME from gh_hkxx a left join gh_hkxx_qrsz b on b.hkxx_id = a.hkxx_id where a.hkxx_id = #{hkxxId}
